description:
Add per-phase verdict-to-target routing in pipeline configuration. Currently all verdicts are handled uniformly: Advance goes to index+1, Rework re-runs current. With on_verdict config, each phase can declare where each verdict routes.

Changes needed:
1. Add PhaseTransitionConfig type to workflow_config.rs:
   - on_verdict: HashMap<String, TransitionTarget> where key is verdict name (advance/rework/fail/skip)
   - TransitionTarget: { target: String, guard: Option<String> }
2. Add WorkflowPhaseConfig to pipeline definition (extending the current phases: Vec<String> to phases: Vec<WorkflowPhaseConfig>)
3. Update lifecycle_executor.rs to consult on_verdict config when processing decisions
4. Default behavior when on_verdict is not configured: advance->next, rework->current (backward compat)
5. Validate on_verdict targets exist in pipeline phases during workflow config validation

Example config:
  code-review:
    on_verdict:
      rework: { target: implementation }
      advance: { target: testing }
      fail: { target: _escalate }

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow_config.rs (PipelineDefinition)
- crates/orchestrator-core/src/workflow/lifecycle_executor.rs
- Depends on TASK-167 (ID-based routing)
title: Add on_verdict transition routing to pipeline phase config
